message:
test(pager): add multi-mode cache transition cycle tests for page resurrection prevention

Adds additional test coverage for the page cache mode transition hardening:
verifying that complex sequences of fast-path enable/disable/write cycles
don't surface stale pages from prior modes, and that eviction history is
properly cleared across transitions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
